Operator-Specific Changes

Trace the evolution of signup packages for each major betting brand.

UK Gambling Bonus Market Analysis

The £30 Threshold: The UK market has coalesced around the £30 free bet value, which provides the optimal customer acquisition cost under current UK Gambling Commission rules.
Shift to Low Barriers: To cater to casual bettors, operators have lowered stakes. Sky Bet, Coral, and Ladbrokes now lead with £5 or any-value entry stakes.
Wagering Extermination: Almost all major UK sportsbooks have abandoned wagering requirements on welcome free bet winnings, paying out returns directly in cash (minus the free bet token stake).
Disclaimer: Historical promotional tracking information is only compiled for operators with at least two years of sports welcome offer data. Operators focusing exclusively on casino or bingo promotions, or those with less than two years of tracked history, are not shown in individual focus charts.

© 2026 BetTracker Pro. Aggregated data is for demonstration and research purposes only.
